{/* ── HERO ── */}
{/* Warm glow */}
Fayzan Rab, MD PCC

Executive Coach and Physician focused on{' '} unlocking human potential

Work with me Learn more
1,000+ coaching hours with high performers
{/* ── LOGO STRIP ── */}
{['Google', 'MD, Emory University', 'PCC Certified (ICF)', 'TEDx Speaker', '1,000+ Coaching Hours'].map(item => ( {item} ))}
{/* ── JOURNEY ── */}
The Journey

I was doing everything right — and it wasn't enough.

Product leader at Google. Series C biotech startup. Successful by every external measure but unclear on what the highest utilization of my gifts would actually look like.

I tried many things before stumbling into executive coaching — then went to medical school and accumulated thousands of hours coaching high performers. The synthesis is the work.

Read the full story →
{/* ── IRREPLACEABLE ── */}
The Irreplaceable Part

You're already surrounded by tools that optimize, analyze, and advise. What's harder to find is someone who actually knows you — who remembers what you said six months ago, notices when something's off, and stays with you through the messy middle.

Fayzan works with a small number of clients at a time — by design. The relationship is the work.

{/* ── SERVICES ── */}
What's Offered

How Fayzan works

1:1 Executive Coaching

1:1 Executive Coaching

Ongoing, high-touch engagement. The relationship deepens over time — and so does the work. Fayzan keeps a deliberately small roster.

Learn More →
Co-Founder Mediation

Co-Founder Mediation

A structured process for founding teams in conflict. Individual and joint sessions — designed to restore trust and find a clear path forward.

Learn More →
{/* ── PULL QUOTE ── */}

"One of the most transformative investments I made in my adult life."

— Neil Tolia, Senior PM at Spotify

{/* ── CTA ── */}

Ready to begin?

Reach out to start a conversation.

fayzanrabcoaching@gmail.com
